title: VPIP Drill-Down Modal com Breakdown por Posição e Stack Depth
plan: Add modal HTML template with two panels (Position view and Stack Depth view) to cash_report.py, including toggle buttons following existing range-tab pattern
Add CSS for modal overlay backdrop with fade animation, modal container with slide-up animation, toggle button styling, and responsive layout matching existing dark/glassmorphism theme

Add JavaScript handlers for: opening modal on VPIP stat card click, closing on X/ESC/backdrop click, toggling between Position and Stack Depth views, dynamically populating tables from data-* attributes
Embed positional stats and stack depth stats as JSON in data-* attributes on VPIP stat cards in cash_report.py (data already available from US-010 and US-017 analyzers)
Replicate the same modal implementation in tournament_report.py for tournament VPIP cards
Test modal open/close behavior, view toggle, data population, health badges, ESC key handling, and responsive layout
